message:
fix(bv): correct flag names for bv CLI robot mode commands

Fixes several flag name inconsistencies in the bv CLI integration:

- GetSearch: Add missing -search flag after -robot-search
- GetLabelAttention: Fix --attention-limit to -attention-limit
- GetFileBeads: Fix --limit to -file-beads-limit
- GetFileHotspots: Fix --limit to -hotspots-limit
- GetFileRelations: Fix --limit to -relations-limit, --threshold to
  -relations-threshold

The bv CLI uses command-specific flag prefixes rather than generic --limit
flags. This aligns the Go integration with bv's actual interface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
